tasks.title: Collect and triage core literature on flow-based SR
tasks.description: Gather key references on flow matching, rectified flow, and UNet architectures for super-resolution; cluster them by theme and document inclusion boundaries.
tasks.completionNotes: Collected key references including OFTSR (arXiv:2412.09465), FlowIE (CVPR 2024), and Rectified Flow (ICLR 2023). Saved literature survey to Survey/reports/flow_based_sr_survey.md.

tasks.title: Summarize trends, baselines, and open gaps in flow-based SR
tasks.description: Synthesize the literature into trends, tensions, and high-value research gaps for flow-based image super-resolution.
tasks.completionNotes: Synthesized literature into key findings, identified 4 major open gaps, and updated research_brief.json with survey results.

tasks.title: Explore novel directions for flow-based SR
tasks.description: Brainstorm novel architectures, flow designs, or training strategies for improving flow-based super-resolution.
